reviews.review_description:
I cannot recommend this game. From the moment I started playing, it was a frustrating experience.

The game is riddled with technical issues. I encountered constant glitches, including freezing and crashing during basic actions, sometimes unable to pickup objects.

Even if the bugs were fixed, the core game feels unfinished. The map is tiny with nothing to explore, the gameplay is repetitive, and there is a severe lack of meaningful content. It simply is not fun for me.

Ultimately, I feel misled. I feel the store page promised a much more robust and engaging experience. What I got was a buggy, bare-bones product that feels like a cash grab.

As I said before the game is kinda dead on arrival as of now and im not sure what you are able to do as far as what you guys are able to add or not add to the game but here are some better suggestions than my previous suggestions. 

1 The fighting mechanics have potential and its one area im sure you can modify better. If you are able, have the punches connect and depending on where and how hard you hit they do certain animations upon impact. 

2 grappling is another thing im sure can be utilized, just make the throws to the floor or walls have an animation or impact sound. 

3 enhance graphics to a moderate appeal. Im not asking for the best graphics but just enough to where I dont feel like im playing in Meta Worlds. 

4 Ways to make cash? Like I suggested before...have different options like fight clubs, boxing, bounty hunts, working a job or do swat team jobs or something like that. Getting money by taking it from people isnt exactly very well through out but it should still be an option where certain people have more cash than others.

5 The main point of the game is to improve your quality of life and the characters gf so im unsure how far you can go with the room and her but if we are just talking about improving a room and a woman I'd have options to dress her up or change her appearances and physique where you can get her to do different things like workout at a gym, negotiating, taking her our make her overweight but I'd suggest that when you upgrade her she gives you passive perks or whatever. The room should have many decorative options and it has to be a room you can use to do fun things in like throwing parties, putting in games, watching movies or cooking...you guys are the creative team im sure you got ideas. 

Now I know these last suggestions are out there and I understand if its not something you can put in the game but what the heck

Short storylines would be ideal as it helps with immersion. Trips outta town where you can visit places or camp. Not talking about an open world game but ya know...just areas that are reasonable for the devs to create. Perhaps a body guard or gang of people that aid you in quest or if you want to go to war on the streets. Idk if this is something youd add but maybe a cool horror storyline involving monsters or dealing with the undead. Maybe make an option to be a mad scientist and turn yourself into a monster and really start throwing people and destroying things?

Once I see more of the direction your game goes in then I can revise my review and give better suggestions.

Ok what is to come ,anything to do after bill paid in house ?what’s the goal?

Thanks for the update to correct this error .I like the npcs I’m not liking the fact of the locked hands happening in the beginning area . Create a run button so my controller doesn’t break due to pressing in the joy stick to currently run. A way to jump and slide would be cool. I can’t wait for the updates .

reviews.review_title: Not as advertised and barely a game
reviews.review_description:
This is more like a test for the engine than an actual game. There's so little to do and the description on here isn't even true. It says there's a city to explore, when there's actually two main roads and two small roads in a rectangle with zero vehicles or (aside from your safehouse) enterable locations (despite the many open doors.)

There are 0 missions, 0 challenges, 0 upgrades for your character (you can upgrade your apartment and girlfriend, but it's painfully slow), 0 interactions beyond attacking, and 0 things other than murdering completely brainless NPCs who don't usually even react to you murdering somebody right of them.

There are police, but no wanted levels, and blind spots on the tiny map where you can kill at your leisure without the police noticing. And once you manage to get a gun? You can wipe out everybody in a few minutes.

The controls are janky, the graphics are PS2 level, and there are weird graphical glitches all over. The background noise of people talking never changes, even once everybody is dead, and there's a constant clanking like  a physics object is trapped somewhere and bouncing around.

I'd image GTA3 was a lot more polished and feature rich almost at the start of development than this paid product is currently.

But beating up people is fun in short bursts, so it gets an extra star for that. My advice is grab an NPC and use them as a weapon, as it kills a lot faster than the game's actual weapons.

enjoyed playing this game a lot, this game is a truly fun experience, offering full freedom and many things you can pick up and use to cause chaos. I love the interactive world where you can smash objects and hurt npcs in fun way. The whole concept of having to earn money by doing bad things for your demanding wife is very engaging and creates a funny storyline that gives you a chance to be a total rebel. highly recommended 💯❤️

The games fun To a certain extent is not much to do in environment besides irritate everybody and beat them up and kill them The big police just don't say nothing just look at you crazy I think if you bother the police's they should chase you with a gun or chase you with a club and try to hit you with it with the club or they are shoot you if you get too far from them they start trying to shoot at you The character voices need to be changed up cuz all of them sound the same with the same dialogue no different voices on the character need to be changed The game got bugs and glitches when you carry a weapon and you go to another side it disappears out your hand or it won't clip through the environment in a disappearing like it's a wall right there stop you from bringing it through like a ghost with a solid object I didn't see the bar like in the trailer The Subway where it show the person going down to a subway I didn't see that the buildings need to be 3D cuz they flat so it kind of kills it a little bit The environment need to be more open with Allie's you going into the stores and eat cars kids dogs birds you can smack out the air or shoot I didn't see the lady like in the trailer with the Mohawk the characters on the trailer kind of look more realistic than the ones in the game and there's a part where there's money a health and a bat and a corner between two trash cans that you can't even get cuz when you get close to it disappears there's some money that's stash in the corner of a building that you can remove or grab or do anything is stuck every night to have a ammo belt or something where you can carry your weapons and ammo it need more different characters instead of the repeat of character that's on the game I notice early access but they need a lot of improvement to make the world alive it's too small and then when you kill everybody an environment it repeats itself once you come back out your building that gets very boring and repetitive it starts off for when you first play it but after a while I try to get boring there's no upgrade for your character no body or your character where you can kick them back there's not much in the environment The world looks dead not alive and when you carry a weapon and make some kind of clinking knocking noise like it's colliding into the environment some weapon seems to disappear once you get to one and where you want to put it instead of just magically appearing there when you put your money in a jar more open world this game can be something they just need a lot of improvement and updates please fix Don't give up you got something here

While lacking due to it being early release, it’s still a very fun game with a bunch of shenanigans to get into, such as shooting up the plaza whacking a person with another , I highly anticipated this game and it was worth it to me. I do wish the map was bigger and that the npcs were doing things like in the trailer, and I notice the underground isn’t in the game I assume it’s a future update

The description of this game is not at all what the experience is. There are minimal things to interact with. You cannot engage in dialog with the npcs nor do they have any voiced lines. (except your nagging girlfriend in your house) the only interaction you can do with the npcs is fight. Each one you kill drops 100 bucks and a random weapon. The weapons go away after a short amount of time, thirty seconds to a minute. There is no way to holster a weapon. Upgrading the house doesn't seem to do anything to the interior, except maybe the bed changes. It seems like I move faster when I press the left stick but it's barely noticeable, the character moves so slow a sprit feature would be really helpful but not enough that it would make this repetitive game loop more fun to play. The only building you can enter is your safe house. The gun takes five or six shots to kill an npc, headshots don't make a difference. After six to ten shots the gun disappears anyway. No reloading mechanic. This is just boring and honestly sad. VR gamers deserve way better than this. Anyone leaving a five star review is either an Ai bot, paid by the developer, or has never played an enjoyable combat sandbox in VR. Try nightclub simulator or viper vice for a much more enjoyable experience. If I could rate this 0 stars I would. I try to see the positive things even in games that aren't great but this is just a pile of crap.

developer_response.body: The game is primarily optimized for fighting, so fire weapons are only included as additional elements with limited usability for now. In the next update to be released this week, we will add more bullets to the weapons, and there will also be ammo scattered on the street to reload the weapons, if anyone likes to shoot, feel free to do so. Anyway the game is in early access now, lots of improvements ara in the pipeline. Check our updates and follow our posts to be more informed about the progress of the game

reviews.review_description: Fighting and shooting are good

reviews.review_title: Smash away your anger and stress
reviews.review_description: This game is a blast. You run around causing chaos, letting out all your frustration, and somehow end up feeling totally relaxed afterward. I even got chased by a cop after accidentally punching him in the face pure fun! It’s the kind of game that gives you a real sense of freedom. The graphics look great, the gameplay feels smooth, and even though it’s still in early access and got some glitches, it got a lot of potential. Definitely worth checking out.

I really enjoyed my time with this VR simulator. My favorite part was the opening setup where the character is pushed by his wife to earn money by any means necessary. It creates a hilarious reason for all the bad behavior that follows. The controls are easy to use, and picking up weapons like the spiked baseball bat feels very real in VR. You get to be a total rebel, destroying objects and exploring the city as you please. This game delivers a unique mix of action and comedy that is hard to find anywhere else.

The gameplay is genuinely enjoyable and hilarious. At first, I thought you just had to collect money, but as the cash piles up, both the room and the chick evolve too. It's not easy to rack up the money, but it's totally worth it.

Another thing: you really need to watch out because you need physical space when things get heated. I accidentally smacked into my closet a few times during more intense fights. Weapons dropped a couple of times too, and I'm hoping there'll eventually be a game mode where you can only use those. Really looking forward to what's in the next update—hoping for more weapons, but at least a global leaderboard :D

Update: I’m playing on a Quest 2 device, and it runs surprisingly well for me. Of course, I also ran into a few bugs over the weekend, but I still believe the game is very promising, so I’m giving it my trust.

fantastic and unique game for anyone who loves virtual reality. What grabbed me right away was the feeling of total freedom. The city feels like a true sandbox where every corner offers a new chance to cause trouble. You can spend ages just picking up different items, whether it is a simple rock or a powerful gun, and seeing what kind of funny chaos you can create. The game is highly interactive and the developers clearly put thought into all the objects you can smash or use It makes all the chaos you cause feel entertaining. I recommend this game highly for anyone who wants a silly, action packed VR experience where you can just let loose and have a good time.

Didn’t expect to laugh this hard in a VR game. The game is pure chaos, street fights, dumb NPCs, and random moments that just make you lose it. The brawling is very interesting, and immersive. Looking forward to what the devs come up with for the full release!

reviews.review_title: Full Freedom and Fun VR Game
reviews.review_description: This game is a total blast. It gives you complete freedom to just mess around in a fun city environment. The amount of things you can touch and interact with npcs is fun. I loved finding all the crazy weapons and just causing chaos. If you want a funny, open world VR game, this is the one to pick up.

Idk if anyone else is having the bugs with using your money and your hands quit working? I have to restart the game to get my hands to work again. Would be way more fun if and when this bug gets fixed

developer_response.body: Sorry for the bad experience, we will fix it asap within few days! Please follow our developer post about the update

reviews.review_description:
Since I'm Not a Bot, let me say this was Trashhhhhh , my advice is too try another industry....it's either you lack finance or you're a rookie, either way this is a big REFUND 

MORE LIKE A TECH DEMO. Smh 😒

The game has strong foundation. The core gameplay is fun. Fighting mechanic is a very nice way to ventilate after the long day of work 😁 It needs some technical and gameplay improvements , but considering it's early access and the game is still developed, it can be a great title after the full-version release.

developer_response.body: Thanks for your feedback, we are extremly motivated to improve the game to became a great title!

reviews.review_description: How can you be a developer and put this game out. Did you not test it. The graphics are poor, the controls don’t work right.  No sound deign at all. Over all,  very boring.  I would never pay for this poor quality of a game. You need a real game designer fix this.

It has a pretty simple gameplay loop with no real challenges and my only major complaints is the weapons breaking without dealing damage, the combat animations make it hard to tell when they're going to attack or just dodge and the ragdolls are sometimes just stiff or go flying after a small punch. 

Overall its pretty good and not too bad.

Spend more money making a decent game and less on advertisements. I was looking forward to this game for so long. I just wanted some mindless GTA styled fun but instead, we get a barely functioning mess.

developer_response.body: Sorry for the bad experience. This is an early access version, please check our updates, you will like it.

reviews.review_description: The game is a lot of fun and offers many individual opportunities to earn money and thus improve his apartment. Offers a lot of fun for some time!
Great game good potential make more maps also better gore more maps would be cool too this would make it more popular
